title: core-microbiome pipeline parameters
description: Nextflow pipeline for core microbiome detection and taxa summary from microbiome feature tables.

input_output_options.title: Input/Output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output.

feature_table.description: Path to the feature/feature table (BIOM, TSV, or GTDB format).

meta_table.description: Path to the metadata CSV file (rows = samples, row names must match feature table).

taxonomy_table.description: Path to the taxonomy table (TSV; col1 = featureID, col2 = taxonomy string). Required for tsv and gtdb input formats.

input_format.description: Format of the input feature table.

output_dir.description: Directory where output CSVs will be written.

filtering_options.title: Filtering options
filtering_options.description: Options for filtering samples before analysis.

min_library_size.description: Minimum per-sample read depth. Samples below this threshold are dropped.

exclude_column.description: Metadata column used to select samples for exclusion.

exclude_values.description: Comma-separated values in exclude_column identifying samples to remove.

grouping_options.title: Grouping options
grouping_options.description: Options for defining sample groups from metadata columns.

group.description: One metadata column, or comma-separated columns to paste (space-joined) as the Groups label. If omitted, all samples are assigned to a single group 'All'.

type.description: One metadata column, or comma-separated columns to paste as an optional point-style label (used in core microbiome step only).

core_microbiome_options.title: Core microbiome options
core_microbiome_options.description: Parameters controlling core microbiome detection via prevalence/detection thresholds.

taxon_rank.description: Taxonomic level at which to run core microbiome analysis.

label.description: Label string prepended to all output file names.

prevalence_min.description: Minimum prevalence (fraction of samples) required to define a taxon as core.

what_detection.description: Whether detection thresholds are expressed as absolute read counts or relative abundances.

detection_steps.description: Number of evenly log-spaced detection threshold steps.

detection_range_min.description: Minimum detection threshold. Set to -1 for automatic selection (1 for absolute, 0.001 for relative).

detection_range_max.description: Maximum detection threshold. Set to -1 for automatic selection (max(abundances)/10 for absolute, 0.2 for relative).

output_options.title: Output Options
output_options.description: Additional output formats produced after all analyses complete.

merge_parquet.description: Merge all output CSVs into a single Parquet file with analysis and table metadata columns.
merge_parquet.help_text: Writes core_microbiome_{label}.parquet to output_dir. Filter by 'analysis' and 'table' columns downstream.
